cards.front: What is the main package name in Android for a new application?
What is the directory structure for a basic Android application?
What is the purpose of the AndroidManifest.xml file?
cards.back: To declare the application's components and permissions

cards.front: What is the purpose of the res folder in an Android project?
cards.back: To store the application's resources, such as layouts and images

cards.front: What is the purpose of the main activity in an Android application?
cards.back: To serve as the entry point for the application and handle user interactions
